CreateBeams.description: Creates Beam elements based on the given parameters.

width.description: Cross section width of the beam. Applied to all segments.

height.description: Cross section height of the beam. Applied to all segments.

CreateClassificationItems.description: Creates Classification Items in the given Classification Systems based on the given parameters.

CreateClassificationSystems.description: Creates Classification Systems including Classification Items based on the given parameters.

CreateColumns.description: Creates Column elements based on the given parameters.

columnsData.description: Array of data to create Columns.

items.description: The parameters of the new Column.

axisRotationAngle.description: Optional column rotation angle in radians.

width.description: Cross section width of the column. Applied to all segments.

depth.description: Cross section depth (height) of the column. Applied to all segments. Only effective for rectangular columns.

CreateDesignOptionCombinations.description: Creates new design option combinations with the given parameters. Available from Archicad 29.

name.description: The name of the design option combination.

activeDesignOptions.description: The list of active design options in the combination.

CreateDesignOptionSets.description: Creates new design option sets with the given names. Available from Archicad 29.

CreateDesignOptions.description: Creates new design options with the given parameters. Available from Archicad 29.

name.description: The name of the design option.

id.description: The string id of the design option.

ownerSetName.description: The name of the owner design option set.

CreateDoors.description: Creates Door elements in host walls based on the given parameters.

favoriteName.description: Optional. Name of an existing Door favorite (as returned by `GetFavoritesByType`). Applied to the Door tool defaults before the create.

CreateLamps.description: Creates Lamp elements based on the given parameters.

lampsData.description: Array of data to create Lamps.

items.description: The parameters of the new Lamp.

libraryPartName.description: The name of the lamp library part to use.

CreateMeshes.description: Creates Mesh elements based on the given parameters.

meshesData.description: Array of data to create Meshes.

items.description: The parameters of the new Mesh.

level.description: The Z reference level of coordinates.

ridges.description: How ridges between mesh facets are displayed in 3D: 'AllSharp' shows all ridges, 'AllSmooth' hides them, 'UserDefined' shows only ridges along user-defined level lines (the drawing-set look for contour-line topography).

showLines.description: Whether to show secondary mesh lines (level lines other than the user-defined ones) on plan.

contourPen.description: Optional pen attribute index for the mesh's contour line.

levelPen.description: Optional pen attribute index for the mesh's level lines.

lineTypeIndex.description: Optional line type attribute index for the mesh's contour.

polygonCoordinates.description: The 3D coordinates of the outline polygon of the mesh.

polygonArcs.description: Polygon outline arcs of the mesh.

sublines.description: The leveling sublines inside the polygon of the mesh.

coordinates.description: The 3D coordinates of the leveling subline of the mesh.

CreateSections.description: Creates Section elements on the floor plan.

CreateStairs.description: Creates Stair elements based on the given baseline and parameters.

stairsData.description: Array of data to create Stair elements.

items.description: The parameters of the new Stair.

baseLinePoints.description: 2D coordinates defining the stair baseline polyline. Minimum 2 points for a straight stair, 3+ for L-shaped or U-shaped stairs.

zCoordinate.description: The Z coordinate (absolute elevation) of the stair base.

CreateTexts.description: Creates standalone Text elements based on the given parameters.

textsData.description: Array of data to create Texts.

items.description: The parameters of the new Text element.

coordinate.description: The placement position of the text. The z value is used to determine the floor when floorIndex is omitted.

text.description: The text content. Newlines create multiple lines.

height.description: The character height in millimeters. Optional; defaults to the Text tool default.

floorIndex.description: Optional floor index. If omitted, derived from the coordinate's z value.

CreateWindows.description: Creates Window elements in host walls based on the given parameters.

favoriteName.description: Optional. Name of an existing Window favorite (as returned by `GetFavoritesByType`). Applied to the Window tool defaults before the create.

ExportFavorites.description: Export the project's Favorites to a .prefs file or folder.

path.description: Absolute path on the AC host. If extension matches the Favorite binary format (.prefs), writes a single file; otherwise treats as folder.

names.description: Optional subset of Favorites to export. Default: export all.

GenerateDocumentation.description: Generates files for the documentation. Used by Tapir developers only.

destinationFolder.description: Destination folder for the generated documentation files.

GetArchicadLocation.description: Retrieves the location of the currently running Archicad executable.

GetAvailableLibraryParts.description: Lists library parts currently available to the project. Filter by typeId (e.g. 'Door', 'Window', 'Object', 'Lamp').

filterByTypeId.description: Optional. Filter by libpart type (matches the value returned by LibPartTypeIdToString).

GetDesignOptionForElements.description: Retrieves the design option association for the specified elements. Available from Archicad 29.

GetDimensionData.description: Gets witness point data (coordinates, measured values) from existing dimension chains.

elements.description: The identifier of the dimension elements.

GetElementsByIFCIds.description: Retrieves the elements by the given IFC identifiers.

ifcIds.description: A list of IFC identifiers to get the corresponding elements for.

GetElementsOfDesignOptions.description: Retrieves the elements associated with the given design options. Available from Archicad 29.

GetIFCIdsOfElements.description: Retrieves the IFC identifiers of the given elements.

GetIFCPropertiesOfElements.description: Retrieves the IFC properties of the given elements.

GetIFCTypeOfElements.description: Retrieves the IFC types of the given elements.

GetProjectInfo.description: Retrieves information about the currently loaded project.

ImportFavorites.description: Import Favorites from a .prefs file or folder into the current project.

path.description: Absolute path on the AC host to a Favorites file (.prefs) or folder.

targetFolder.description: Folder hierarchy under which to import. Empty = root.

importFolders.description: If true and `path` is a folder, the folder structure is preserved.

conflictPolicy.description: How to resolve name conflicts. Default Overwrite.

MoveDesignOptionsToAnotherSet.description: Moves the given design options to another sets. Available from Archicad 29.

designOptionId.description: The identifier of the design option to move.

MoveElements.description: Moves elements with a given vector.

elementsWithMoveVectors.description: The elements with move vector pairs.

copy.description: Optional parameter. If true, then a copy of the element will be moved. By default it's false.

MoveElementsToDesignOptions.description: Moves the given elements into the given design options. Use NULLGuid for design option to remove the element from any design options and move it to the main model. Available from Archicad 29.

designOptionId.description: The identifier of the design option to move the element into. Use NULLGuid to remove the element from any design option and move it to the main model.

regenerate.description: Regenerate the view. The default is false, meaning the view will not be regenerated, but rebuilt.

items.description: Defines a 3D cut plane using the plane equation: pa*x + pb*y + pc*z + pd = 0

pa.description: Coefficient of x in the plane equation. The x coordinate of the normal vector of the plane.

pb.description: Coefficient of y in the plane equation. The y coordinate of the normal vector of the plane.

pc.description: Coefficient of z in the plane equation. The z coordinate of the normal vector of the plane.

pd.description: Constant term in the plane equation. The distance of the plane from the origin along the normal vector.

SetActiveDesignOptionsInCombinations.description: Sets active design options in the given combinations. Available from Archicad 29.

activeDesignOptions.description: The list of active design options in the combination.
